sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74959" key="o)rqoko/rudos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-κόρῠδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n74959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a very lark,</tr_> nickname of one with a thin bad voice, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.48</biblScope> </bibl> (Bergler for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρθοκόρυζος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
